name: Impossible Ham Quiche
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred (2 cups) mushrooms and sauté in butter in a medium skillet until lightly browned. Drain well and set aside.
2. In a container of electric blender, combine the remaining ingredients and process until well blended.
3. Mix the egg mixture with the sautéed mushrooms, cheese, and ham. Pour into a greased 10-inch quiche dish.
4. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until set. The quiche should be puffed and golden brown. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
YIELD: One 10-inch Quiche
